summary: Iteration 123: Tested project-scoped avatar system for DirectedStudio. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (93%). All new project-avatar endpoints working correctly. Frontend: DirectedStudio loads with project list, PERSONAGENS step shows characters with 'Criar' and 'Acervo' buttons, AvatarLibraryModal opens with search/filter and import functionality.

minor.issue: Avatar saved to project but not immediately visible in global library (GET /api/data/avatars). Possible cache timing issue - the save_to_library flag saves to settings but the global library endpoint may return cached data.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate cache timing for save_to_library flag - avatar is saved but may not appear immediately in global library due to cache layer
critical_code_review_comments: New project-avatar endpoints correctly implemented in /app/backend/routers/studio/projects.py (lines 174-274)
GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/project-avatars returns project-scoped avatars (empty for new projects)
POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/project-avatars adds avatar to project with optional save_to_library flag
POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/project-avatars/import imports from global library into project
DELETE /api/studio/projects/{id}/project-avatars/{avatar_id} removes from project only (keeps in global library)
Frontend DirectedStudio.jsx uses projectAvatars state instead of global avatars prop
AvatarLibraryModal component properly shows global library with search/filter and import functionality
New projects start with empty project_avatars array (verified via test)
No cross-project avatar pollution - avatars are isolated per project
seed_data_creation: Test avatars created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 123 complete. Project-scoped avatar system verified. Test credentials: test@agentflow.com / password123. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/project-avatars, POST .../import, DELETE .../project-avatars/{avatar_id}. Frontend: DirectedStudio PERSONAGENS step (step 2) shows project-scoped avatars with 'Criar' (create) and 'Acervo' (library import) buttons. AvatarLibraryModal opens from 'Acervo' button with search and import functionality. Projects tested: 1a0779dd0ce7 (ADAO E EVA BIBLIZOO with character_avatars), d27afb0e79ff (ADAO E EVA BIBLIZOO 2).

backend_tests.test_add_avatar_with_save_to_library: FAIL - Avatar saved to project but not immediately visible in global library (cache timing)

features_verified.project_scoped_avatars: VERIFIED - New projects start empty, avatars isolated per project
features_verified.acervo_button: VERIFIED - Opens AvatarLibraryModal for importing from global library
features_verified.avatar_library_modal: VERIFIED - Shows global library with search, filter, select all, import
features_verified.remove_from_project: VERIFIED - DELETE removes from project only, keeps in global library
features_verified.no_cross_project_pollution: VERIFIED - Avatars added to one project don't appear in another
